overview: InfraSetu is a smart construction management platform for government projects. It supports 8 roles: Government Authority, Project Manager, Site Engineer, Contractor, Worker, Auditor, Community, and Public. The Public interface lets anyone browse nearby construction sites on a map, view what's been promised, and raise complaints with photos if they see discrepancies.
features: Public map showing nearby construction sites using geolocation
Construction project details with promised milestones, budget, and timeline
Public complaint filing with photo upload
Flag indicators on projects with unresolved complaints
Government Authority dashboard with Public Complaints section
Role-based login for all internal roles
